name: repos
context: GitHub repository management — create, clone, configure, and manage repos
info: Full repository lifecycle management via GitHub API. Create repos, manage settings, configure branch protection, set up webhooks, manage collaborators, and handle releases.
triggers: set up a new project on github

scripts.name: Create Repository
scripts.inline:
#!/bin/bash
set -e
curl -s -X POST \
  -H "Authorization: token $GITHUB_TOKEN" \
  -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" \
  https://api.github.com/user/repos \
  -d "{
    \"name\": \"$REPO_NAME\",
    \"description\": \"$REPO_DESC\",
    \"private\": ${PRIVATE:-false},
    \"auto_init\": true
  }"

scripts.name: Init and Push
scripts.description: Initialize a local directory and push to a new GitHub repo
scripts.inline:
#!/bin/bash
set -e
cd "$PROJECT_DIR"
git init
git add .
git commit -m "${COMMIT_MSG:-Initial commit}"
git branch -M main
git remote add origin "https://$GITHUB_TOKEN@github.com/$GITHUB_USER/$REPO_NAME.git"
git push -u origin main

author: dojo-community
